summary: Job application notification feature testing completed. All 13 tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Job applications create notifications for admins with correct details, 2) Application status updates create notifications for students with status-specific messages, 3) Notifications API returns correct unread_count, 4) Background tasks don't affect response time.

job_application_admin_notification.details: When student applies for job, admin receives notification with job_id, job_title, applicant_name, applicant_email

application_status_student_notification.details: When admin updates application status, student receives notification with status-specific message

details.interview: 🎉 Interview Invitation - You've been invited for an interview...
details.accepted: ✅ Application Accepted! - Congratulations! Your application has been accepted!
details.rejected: 📋 Application Update - Your application was not selected at this time
details.reviewing: 📝 Application Under Review - Your application is being reviewed

notifications_api.details: GET /api/notifications returns correct structure with notifications, total, unread_count, skip, limit

background_task_performance.details: Job endpoints respond quickly (<1s) despite background notification tasks

notification_data_completeness.details: All notifications have required fields: id, user_id, title, body, type, read, created_at, data

pagination.details: Notification pagination with skip/limit works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ notify_job_application() correctly stores notification for all admins in tenant
✓ notify_application_status_change() uses appropriate status-specific messages (tactful 'not selected' for rejected)
✓ Background tasks (BackgroundTasks) used correctly for non-blocking notification delivery
✓ store_notification() helper properly creates notification documents with all required fields
✓ NotificationContext.js correctly handles job_application and job_application_status navigation cases
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job application notification feature fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) Admin notifications created when students apply (with job_id, job_title, applicant_name, applicant_email), 2) Student notifications created when admin updates status (with status-specific messages), 3) All notification API endpoints working correctly (get, unread-count, mark-read, mark-all-read, pagination). Push notifications may not deliver without real device tokens but notification_history is correctly stored.

notification_types_tested.job_application_status: Student receives when admin updates status

mocked_note: Push notification delivery (APNs) may not work without real device tokens, but notification_history storage is verified working
